(Node.js / Express)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="900" x="300" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bg" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0d1117;strokeColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1000" width="1500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.archimate3.actor;fillColor=#1a3a5c;strokeColor=#4a9eda;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;arcSize=10;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="140" x="60" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="webapp" parent="1" style='font-size:9px;color:#aaaaaa'>[External]</font><br><b>Web App</b><br><font style='font-size:10px'>React SPA<br>Azure Static Web Apps</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="180" x="40" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sql" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#6b21a8;strokeColor=#a855f7;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=10;strokeWidth=2;" value="<font style='font-size:9px;color:#aaaaaa'>[External]</font><br><b>Azure SQL</b><br><font style='font-size:10px'>Claims + Audit schema<br>Persists all data</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="180" x="40" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="boundary" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0d1f35;strokeColor=#2ecc71;fontColor=#2ecc71;fontSize=13;verticalAlign=top;arcSize=3;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 4;" value="«Azure App Service» Claims API" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="780" width="860" x="280" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="auth" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1a4a7c;strokeColor=#4a9eda;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=10;strokeWidth=2;" value="<font style='font-size:9px;color:#aaaaaa'>[Component]</font><br><b>Auth Middleware</b><br><font style='font-size:10px'>express-jwt + Entra JWKS<br>Validates JWT on every route</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="570" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="claims" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1d6a3a;strokeColor=#2ecc71;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=10;strokeWidth=2;" value="<font style='font-size:9px;color:#aaaaaa'>[Component]</font><br><b>Claims Controller</b><br><font style='font-size:10px'>Express Router /claims<br>CRUD + ownership check</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="370" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="receipt" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#7c4a1a;strokeColor=#f5a623;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=10;strokeWidth=2;" value="<font style='font-size:9px;color:#aaaaaa'>[Component]</font><br><b>Receipt Orchestrator</b><br><font style='font-size:10px'>Signed URL generator<br>SAS PUT URL · size/type check</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="590" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="export" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#3d3d1a;strokeColor=#a3a320;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=10;strokeWidth=2;" value="<font style='font-size:9px;color:#aaaaaa'>[Component]</font><br><b>Export Controller</b><br><font style='font-size:10px'>Express Router /export<br>Finance-only · 202 Accepted</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="810" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="approval" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#6b21a8;strokeColor=#a855f7;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=10;strokeWidth=2;" value="<font style='font-size:9px;color:#aaaaaa'>[Component]</font><br><b>Approval Engine</b><br><font style='font-size:10px'>State machine (pure fn)<br>Draft→Submit→Approved/Rejected</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="370" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="audit" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2d3d1a;strokeColor=#a3a320;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=10;strokeWidth=2;" value="<font style='font-size:9px;color:#aaaaaa'>[Component]</font><br><b>Audit Writer</b><br><font style='font-size:10px'>Append-only DB client<br>INSERT-only · audit schema</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="590" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="notif" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1d6a3a;strokeColor=#2ecc71;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=10;strokeWidth=2;" value="<font style='font-size:9px;color:#aaaaaa'>[Component]</font><br><b>Notif. Publisher</b><br><font style='font-size:10px'>Service Bus SDK<br>Publishes claim events async</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="810" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="health" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#3b3b3b;strokeColor=#888888;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=10;strokeWidth=2;" value="<font style='font-size:9px;color:#aaaaaa'>[Component]</font><br><b>Health Controller</b><br><font style='font-size:10px'>Express Router<br>/health · /health/db</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="590" y="720" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="blob" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#7c3a1a;strokeColor=#f5a623;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=10;strokeWidth=2;" value="<font style='font-size:9px;color:#aaaaaa'>[External]</font><br><b>Blob Storage</b><br><font style='font-size:10px'>Azure Blob Storage<br>Stores receipt files</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="180" x="1230" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bus" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0e7490;strokeColor=#22d3ee;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=10;strokeWidth=2;" value="<font style='font-size:9px;color:#aaaaaa'>[External]</font><br><b>Service Bus</b><br><font style='font-size:10px'>Azure Service Bus<br>Async message broker</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="180" x="1230" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#4a9eda;fontColor=#4a9eda;fontSize=10;" target="webapp" value="uses via HTTPS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="webapp" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#4a9eda;fontColor=#4a9eda;fontSize=10;" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=0.7;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#a3a320;fontColor=#a3a320;fontSize=10;" target="export" value="passes finance role"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="claims" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#a855f7;fontColor=#a855f7;fontSize=10;" target="audit" value="writes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="export" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#a3a320;fontColor=#a3a320;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" target="notif" value="enqueues job"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="approval" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.3;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#a855f7;fontColor=#a855f7;fontSize=10;" style="rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=0.563;exitY=1.042;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.7;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#a3a320;fontColor=#a3a320;fontSize=10;exitPerimeter=0;" target="sql" value="inserts audit / SQL·TDS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.245" y="85" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="703" y="680" /> <mxPoint x="590" y="680" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" source="receipt"
